name: pta_l6_peak_deviation
app_r_label: PTA l=6 peak angular-correlation deviation (Ch21 Sec 21.1.3, Tier 2)
tier: Tier 2 (phason-graviton linear coupling; algebraic identity once stiffness ratio is fixed)
app_r_precision_str: Algebraic-identity check: epsilon * max|P_6| = 1.7307e-04 * 1.0000 = 1.7307e-04 reproduces the manuscript boxed value 1.7307e-04 (0.00e+00% residual). Single-formula identity, not a two-route convergence.
